title: cymbidium × wiganianum
intro: Cymbidium × wiganianum, also known as the Wigan's orchid or Wigan's cymbidium, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium erythraea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Cymbidium × wiganianum is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, skin problems, and even certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations involving the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
